definition: OpenFOAM/static pressure endpoint value on a declared tap or section plane.
allowed_use_now: Report gross static rise/drop when endpoints and sign are declared.
forbidden_use_now: Fit component K/F6 from gross static difference alone.
admission_blocker: Endpoint fields and ordinary-flow/component isolation not released.
next_required_gate: Terminal endpoint readiness plus same-QOI endpoint UQ.

definition: Pressure basis with hydrostatic contribution separated consistently over the same elevation span.
allowed_use_now: Use to distinguish hydrostatic owner from residual owner.
forbidden_use_now: Mix p and p_rgh or call hydrostatic head an irreversible loss.
admission_blocker: Same-basis endpoint extraction and hydrostatic convention must be fixed per candidate.

definition: Static plus dynamic basis for recovery-plane or total-loss checks.
allowed_use_now: Use only as future recovery-plane requirement.
forbidden_use_now: Infer total-pressure loss without velocity/area and recovery plane.
admission_blocker: Recovery plane and velocity-area basis absent.
next_required_gate: Recovery-plane extraction design and velocity basis release.

definition: rho*g*Delta_z on the same endpoint basis.
allowed_use_now: Report hydrostatic dominance and keep it separate from residual.
forbidden_use_now: Hide hydrostatic mismatch inside K or F6.
admission_blocker: rho/property basis and endpoint elevation convention must be released.
next_required_gate: Property package and endpoint geometry release.

definition: Same-endpoint dynamic pressure correction from velocity basis.
allowed_use_now: Keep separate in diagnostic pressure ladder.
forbidden_use_now: Absorb kinetic correction into K/F6 coefficient.
admission_blocker: Velocity/area basis not admitted for component extraction.
next_required_gate: Velocity basis and plane area audit.

definition: Straight/reference and entry-development subtraction before component isolation.
forbidden_use_now: Claim ordinary component K without it.

definition: Residual after hydrostatic, kinetic, and declared reference terms, labeled as section-level evidence.
allowed_use_now: Use as thesis evidence for throughflow-plus-recirculation pressure modeling.
forbidden_use_now: Clip to positive K, hidden multiplier, F6, or component K.
admission_blocker: Component isolation, ordinary-flow topology, and same-QOI UQ absent.

definition: Definition of U, area, hydraulic diameter, direction, and mass-flow relation used in Re/K/F6.
forbidden_use_now: Use CFD mdot as runtime input or compare K across inconsistent areas.
admission_blocker: Runtime mdot and area basis not candidate-specific released.
next_required_gate: Runtime mdot solve plus geometry/area manifest.

definition: Q > 0 into salt CV; pressure work and heat terms signed by declared CV.
allowed_use_now: Use for all heat-path and pressure-energy tables.
forbidden_use_now: Flip signs to make residuals positive or fit-friendly.
admission_blocker: None for policy; candidate terms still need release.
